articles.title: Site arrival checklist
articles.summary: A 2-minute checklist to prevent rework and speed up closeout.
content: Confirm ticket details before entering the site.
Capture LED states and any visible errors.
Take label photos before making changes.

articles.title: Basic network triage
articles.summary: Interactive guided troubleshooting for connectivity issues.

no_link.result: Check cable, switch port, and power to device.

ip.question: Does the device receive an IP address?

dhcp.question: Is the switch port configured for the correct VLAN?

fix_vlan.result: Correct the switch port VLAN assignment, then retry DHCP.

dhcp_scope.question: Is the DHCP scope healthy and available?

fix_dhcp_scope.result: Restore or expand the DHCP scope, then retry the connection.

escalate_dhcp.result: Escalate to the network team with VLAN, port, and DHCP findings.

gateway.question: Can the device reach the default gateway?

gateway_issue.result: Escalate to the network team with IP address, subnet, gateway, and ping results.

dns_issue.result: Check DNS server settings or escalate with IP, gateway, and DNS test results.

service_access.question: Can the device reach the required internal service or external endpoint?

routing_firewall.result: Investigate routing, firewall, proxy, or upstream path issues and escalate with collected test results.

app_layer.result: Network path appears healthy. Continue application-layer troubleshooting and attach collected test results to the ticket.
